features: Uplifting Fragrance: Blend of Paradise Fruits and Rainbow Dreams, inspiring all the positive vibes during your showers
Gently Cleanses: This shower gel leaves skin feeling soft, smooth, and revitalized after each use.
Cruelty-free and Vegan: Cussons Creations is committed to sustainability A compassionate choice for conscious consumers
For the whole family: Our body wash is formulated to be suitable for all the family, ensuring a delightful and refreshing shower every time
Artfully Crafted Design: Our packaging is 100 Percent recyclable, with eye-catching designs that also add some fun to your bathroom
description: Product Description Shower yourself in positive vibes with this delightfully dreamy creation, full of tropical sunshine and rainbows Leaves skin feeling clean and soft. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-7, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glycol Distearate, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Linalool, CI 16035, CI 17200 Safety Warning For external use only.
